message:
fix: complete per-module clippy lint allows across all crates

The previous commit cd98380 replaced crate-wide #![allow(clippy::nursery)]
and #![allow(clippy::pedantic)] with per-module allows but missed several
modules and lints, leaving ~104 warnings (or ~140 with all features).

Crates fixed:
- bubbletea-macros: add single_char_pattern, uninlined_format_args
- bubbletea: add use_self/branches_sharing_code to command, cast_sign_loss/
  collapsible_if/ignored_unit_patterns/stable_sort_primitive to program,
  uninlined_format_args to message, unreadable_literal to simulator
- charmed_log: add significant_drop_tightening, redundant_clone crate-wide
- glamour: add needless_raw_string_hashes/range_plus_one crate-wide,
  format_collect/similar_names to syntax, needless_collect to table
- glow: add needless_raw_string_hashes crate-wide, needless_collect to
  browser, full lint set for github module (11 lints)
- huh: add format_collect crate-wide
- bubbles: add single_char_pattern to help/textarea/textinput,
  float_cmp to progress, duration_suboptimal_units to stopwatch/timer,
  unreadable_literal to filepicker
- wish: add duration_suboptimal_units/unnested_or_patterns/
  significant_drop_tightening/needless_raw_string_hashes crate-wide,
  ip_constant to session
- conformance: add inherent_to_string/match_wildcard_for_single_variants/
  unnecessary_literal_bound to harness, assertions_on_constants/empty_loop/
  single_char_pattern/explicit_iter_loop to crates mod, useless_vec to
  benchmark_e2e, io_other_error/needless_question_mark to error_e2e
- demo_showcase: add doc_markdown to cli, needless_pass_by_value/
  redundant_clone to data, collapsible_if/match_wildcard_for_single_variants
  to ssh, full lint set for ssh_e2e tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -51,6 +51,7 @@ pub mod cursor;
 #[allow(
     clippy::missing_const_for_fn,
     clippy::redundant_closure_for_method_calls,
+    clippy::single_char_pattern,
     clippy::uninlined_format_args
 )]
 pub mod help;
@@ -67,6 +68,7 @@ pub mod paginator;
     clippy::cast_possible_truncation,
     clippy::cast_precision_loss,
     clippy::cast_sign_loss,

     clippy::literal_string_with_formatting_args,
     clippy::many_single_char_names,
@@ -87,6 +89,7 @@ pub mod runeutil;
 )]

 #[allow(
+    clippy::duration_suboptimal_units,

 )]
@@ -109,11 +113,13 @@ pub mod textarea;

 )]
 pub mod textinput;
 #[allow(

@@ -138,6 +144,7 @@ pub mod viewport;

+    clippy::unreadable_literal,
     clippy::use_self
 )]
 pub mod filepicker;

@@ -177,10 +177,12 @@

 #[allow(

@@ -236,7 +248,8 @@ pub mod screen;

     clippy::items_after_statements,
@@ -95,6 +101,7 @@ pub mod harness;
     clippy::option_if_let_else,
     clippy::redundant_clone,
     clippy::redundant_closure_for_method_calls,
+    clippy::single_char_pattern,

@@ -120,12 +127,17 @@ mod benchmark_validation;
 
 // Benchmark e2e tests - verify full benchmark workflow
 #[cfg(test)]
-#[allow(clippy::pedantic, clippy::nursery)]

 mod benchmark_e2e;
 
 // Error propagation e2e tests - verify errors work across crate boundaries
 #[cfg(test)]
-#[allow(clippy::pedantic, clippy::nursery)]
+#[allow(
+    clippy::pedantic,
+    clippy::nursery,
+    clippy::io_other_error,
+    clippy::needless_question_mark

 mod error_e2e;
 
 // Re-export the crates under test for convenience
